offer.title: Houston is moving to the cloud
offer.body: Houston now runs in the cloud, so your assistants keep working around the clock, even when your computer is off. Let's bring everything you've built with you.
offer.reassure: Keep Houston open while it finishes. Your data on this computer stays safe.
offer.found: We found {{agents}} across {{workspaces}} on this computer.
offer.foundWithHistory: We found {{agents}} across {{workspaces}} on this computer, along with your past conversations.
offer.timeNote: Bringing everything over can take a few minutes.
offer.startFreshHint: You can keep using Houston without your old data. It stays safe on this computer.
offer.benefit1Body: Your assistants are ready 24/7, from any of your devices.
offer.benefit2Body: Scheduled tasks run in the cloud, so they keep going even when your computer is off.
offer.benefit3Body: Your agents, files, skills, and past conversations come over automatically.
offer.step1Body: Your agents, files, and conversations come over. This takes a couple of minutes.
offer.step2Body: Sign in to your AI again and reconnect your apps.
offer.freeNote: This move is completely free. Every Houston user moves to the cloud on a free plan, so you can keep using your assistants at no cost.
offer.keepOpen: Keep Houston open while it finishes. Your data on this computer stays safe.

progress.title: Moving to the cloud
progress.body: Sit tight, this takes a couple of minutes. You can leave this window open.
progress.phaseFiles: Packing up your files and skills
progress.keepOpen: Please keep Houston open until it finishes.
progress.preparing: Getting your data ready. This can take a few minutes.
progress.startFailed: We couldn't read your old data.

done.title: Your assistants made it
done.summary_one: {{count}} assistant is now in the cloud, with everything it needs.
done.summary_other: {{count}} assistants are now in the cloud, with everything they need.
done.leftBehindBody: These assistants didn't come along this time. Their data stays safe on this computer.
done.excludedTitle: Some larger files stayed on this computer
done.rejectedTitle: A few items couldn't come along
done.reconnectAiBody: Your assistants made it to the cloud. Connect your AI once to start using them.
done.reconnectAppsBody: These are the apps your assistants used before. Reconnect any you want now, or later from the Apps section.
